name: Bacon Roll-Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine milk and cream cheese. Stir until smooth.
2. Spread about 2 teaspoons of the mixture on each side of a piece of bread.
3. Cut the bread into two pieces.
4. Wrap each piece with bacon.
5. Place the rolls on a broiler pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until the bacon is browned.
7. These freeze well and can be thawed before cooking.
8. Yields 50 rolls.
